name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-51
title: feature.json surface.scripts is non-spec field (spec defines hooks/commands/skills/settings only)
description: rabbit-cage/feature.json declares surface.scripts (lines 11-18) listing six .py scripts. But spec.md Inv 29 states 'surface.hooks, surface.commands, and surface.settings in feature.json are all [] (empty arrays); hooks, commands, and settings are now managed via build-contract.json copy-file targets.' A 'scripts' key is not mentioned in the spec's surface schema; new-feature.py (lines 93-97) scaffolds surface as {hooks:[], commands:[], skills:[]} without a scripts key. Either codify surface.scripts in the spec/contract/validator, or remove it from rabbit-cage/feature.json. Currently the field is silently ignored.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
